Hero.title:
A tracker you can earn with,
not worry about problems
Hero.counterText: marketers are already increasing profit with Contrall
Hero.migrationText: Migrate your campaigns from any tracker in 5 minutes and start earning more right away

AboutProduct.title: Your assistant for maximum profit from every click
AboutProduct.subtitle: We eliminated technical complexity and created a tool that generates profit 24/7 — no hidden fees, no blocks, no losses from slow performance.
AboutProduct.card1Desc: See profit from every campaign instantly — no delays, no guessing. Make decisions based on data, not intuition.
AboutProduct.card2Desc: Fixed price of $99/month for full functionality — no extra charges for events, no hidden limits, no billing surprises.
AboutProduct.card3Title: Instant start with already running campaigns
AboutProduct.card3Desc: Import all campaigns from Binom or Keitaro in 5 minutes — no data loss, no downtime, no reconfiguration.
AboutProduct.quote: Not just a tracker, but a business partner in advertising traffic

WhyChoose.title: Why people choose Contrall even after 5+ years with Binom and Keitaro
WhyChoose.subtitle: We don't just promise value — we give you real numbers
WhyChoose.profitTitle: 83% of clients increase profit within the first 30 days
WhyChoose.savingsDesc: With a volume of 100,000 clicks per day, you save $400-600 per month compared to competitors.
WhyChoose.supportDesc: 24/7 support via Telegram from real affiliate marketers, not technical specialists. Get a response as quickly as possible!
WhyChoose.simplicityDesc: Binom and Keitaro require hours of training and setup. Contrall has an intuitive interface that even a beginner can master.
WhyChoose.protectionDesc: 'Anti-detect' often requires connecting third-party services for an additional $50-200 per month. Contrall has a built-in protection system.
WhyChoose.growthDesc: Net profit growth after switching from Binom and Keitaro
WhyChoose.quoteText: Don't just switch trackers — find a reliable partner

Integrations.title: Works with your tools — no reconfiguration from scratch
Integrations.subtitle1: Contrall is built to fit into your workflow, not to make you change everything.
Integrations.subtitle2: All your current tools will keep working, but now you'll get the full picture of profit and the ability to grow it.
Integrations.adSystemsDesc: Conversion tracking without losses. See the real cost per lead from each source and choose the most profitable channels.
Integrations.partnerDesc: Automatic tracking of offers and affiliate commissions. No more manual data reconciliation.
Integrations.teamDesc: Flexible access rights: managers see only their campaigns, analysts see reports, and the owner sees the full financial picture.
Integrations.feature1Desc: The system analyzes your data and suggests where you can increase ROI.
Integrations.feature2Desc: See not just conversions, but net profit from every click factoring in traffic costs, commissions, and your expenses.
Integrations.feature3Desc: Migrate campaigns in 5 minutes from Binom, Keitaro, Voluum without losing history and statistics.
